subject: Re: Downsample image for CTF estimation?
body:
Hi Dmitry,

It is just a bit tricky to see Thon rings in images collected at very small 
pixel size (0.5A) on the Falcon III camera. I've played around with the 
frequency range and it seems to work more or less.

Cheers

Andrea

On Thursday, 16 August 2018 17:29:52 UTC+1, Andrea Nans wrote:
>
> Hi Dmitry,
>
> Just wondering if it will ever be possible to downsample the image for CTF 
> estimation but carry out the motion-correction and particle picking on the 
> un-binned image?
>
> Thanks
>
> Andrea
>
